title: Form Validation
description: Validate user input and show error messages.

slides.title: Why Validate? ✅
slides.content:
# Ensuring Correct Data

Validation ensures that the data meets requirements before submission. Types:

- **Presence** (required fields)
- **Format** (email, phone number)
- **Length** (min/max characters)
- **Match** (password confirmation)

We'll implement client‑side validation and display error messages.

slides.title: Validation State
Displaying Errors

quizData.question: Where should validation typically occur in a form?

options.text: On submit and optionally on blur or change

quizData.explanation: You can validate on submit, but also on blur (when the user leaves a field) for immediate feedback.

slides.title: Real‑time Validation
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: Always validate on the server as well – client validation is for user experience, not security.
